text:
Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: Three-digit value; may have leading zeros; are displayed by file type, according to the source: 

TOS 
code TOS description IP LT OT RX 

001 Inpatient hospital services, other than services in an institution for mental diseases X 
002 Outpatient hospital services X 
003 Rural health clinic services X 
004 Other ambulatory services furnished by a rural health clinic X 
005 Professional laboratory services X 
006 Technical laboratory
